stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
Yes. Blacklist already written. Just rebuild initramfs + reboot:

```bash
sudo mkinitcpio -P && sudo reboot
```

After reboot: nouveau won't load at all, nvidia module loads instead automatically via udev. No manual modprobe needed.
